task: Parse an AWS CloudWatch log entry and extract the timestamp, log level, and message using a regular expression
solution_criteria: The regex should correctly capture three groups: (1) ISO 8601 timestamp, (2) log level (INFO, ERROR, WARN, DEBUG), and (3) the remaining message text. Should handle variations in timestamp formats.

task: Write a Python function that takes an AWS S3 bucket name and returns True if it follows AWS naming conventions (lowercase, 3-63 characters, no underscores)
solution_criteria: Function should validate bucket name against all AWS S3 naming rules, return a boolean, and handle edge cases like names that are too short or contain invalid characters.

task: Create a JSON CloudFormation template snippet for an IAM policy that allows read-only access to a specific S3 bucket
solution_criteria: JSON should be valid CloudFormation syntax, include proper PolicyDocument structure, specify S3 GetObject and ListBucket actions, and restrict access to a single bucket ARN placeholder.
